flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Southwestern Indian Polytechnic Institute fell 38% between 2021 and 2024 (344 → 215).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment fell 36% at Southwestern Indian Polytechnic Institute vs the 2018–2022 baseline (233 vs 367).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion fell 5 pp at Southwestern Indian Polytechnic Institute vs the 2003–2007 baseline (8.8% vs 14.2%).

flags.label: First-year retention
flags.summary: First-year retention at Southwestern Indian Polytechnic Institute rose 73% between 2021 and 2024 (33.8% → 58.5%).
